changelog: CRITICAL: Eliminated ALL CMD popup windows during voice preview
Complete subprocess suppression - zero window interruptions
Google Cloud TTS integration with bundled credentials
Perfect voice differentiation - male vs female voices clearly different
Silent FFmpeg operations - all audio processing completely silent
Enhanced EXE compatibility with proper resource loading
upgrade_notes: UPDATE KRITIS: Versi ini mengatasi masalah CMD popup yang sangat mengganggu saat voice preview. Semua operasi audio sekarang benar-benar silent tanpa jendela popup. Google Cloud TTS terintegrasi untuk kualitas suara premium. WAJIB UPDATE!
